title: Reflex microscopy and culture triggered
description: Urinalysis prompted reflex microscopy and urine culture because of positive nitrite, positive leukocyte esterase, and cloudy urine appearance.

title: Laboratory encounter initiated
description: Encounter at Northwind Children's Specialty Center documented for Avery Rowan with ordering provider M. Ortega, MD.

title: Respiratory viral PCR negative
description: Respiratory viral PCR was final and showed adenovirus not detected, influenza A/B negative, and RSV negative at 11:06.

title: Blood specimen collected for chemistry panel
description: Primary blood specimen 25D-223C1098 was collected for comprehensive metabolic panel, hepatic panel, and lactate testing at 09:58.

title: CBC specimen collected
description: Peripheral blood specimen 25D-223H1101 was collected for CBC with differential and smear review at 09:58.

title: Coagulation specimen collected
description: Citrate plasma specimen was collected at 10:14 for coagulation studies including PT, INR, aPTT, fibrinogen, and D-dimer.

title: Blood culture set A collected
description: Blood culture set A specimen was collected at 10:18.

title: Respiratory swab collected
description: Swab specimen 25D-223S5120 was collected at 10:23 for respiratory viral PCR testing.

title: Peripheral smear confirmed marked platelet decrease
description: Microscopy platelet estimate was markedly decreased.

title: Peripheral smear showed anisopoikilocytosis
description: Smear review reported anisopoikilocytosis with occasional target cells and no schistocytes.

title: Potassium result may be falsely elevated
description: Laboratory comment stated potassium may be falsely elevated because of specimen hemolysis.

title: Elevated lactate result
description: Lactate was markedly elevated at 4.8 mmol/L on blood testing, resulted at 10:20.

title: CBC showed leukopenia
description: WBC count was low at 2.1 x10^3/µL, resulted at 10:26.

title: CBC showed anemia
description: Hemoglobin was low at 8.1 g/dL and hematocrit was 24.6%, with low RBC count 2.88 x10^6/µL.

title: CBC showed severe thrombocytopenia
description: Platelet count was critically low at 42 x10^3/µL, resulted at 10:26.

title: CBC showed neutropenia
description: Absolute neutrophil count was low at 0.7 x10^3/µL.

title: CBC showed lymphopenia
description: Absolute lymphocyte count was low at 0.4 x10^3/µL.

title: Urinalysis showed proteinuria and glucosuria
description: Urine protein was 100 mg/dL and urine glucose was 50 mg/dL.

title: Urine specimen collected
description: Clean-catch urine specimen for urinalysis with reflex microscopy and culture was collected at 10:07.

title: Urinalysis showed concentrated urine
description: Specific gravity was elevated at 1.031.

title: Critical lab values verbally reported
description: Platelet count of 42 x10^3/µL and lactate 4.8 mmol/L were verbally read back to J. Mercer, RN at 10:34.
